creator: roger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This problem was caused because Brad had an old and out of date version of 
bison on his machine. 
Brad upgraded from FreeBSD 3.2 to 4.3. Bison has now moved to the ports tree 
so during the upgrade, his copy of bison was not updated. 
The fix it to install bison from the ports tree. 
Also, installing openh323 from the ports tree would also have 
caused the newer bison to be installed.
